home.metaDescription: Infra.Health is a specialized healthcare asset development company offering turnkey hospital EPC, capital advisory, design, and facility management globally.
home.ogTitle: Infra.Health | End-to-End Healthcare Infrastructure & Asset Development
home.ogDescription: Partner with Infra.Health to build resilient, investment-grade healthcare assets. From strategic planning and capital structuring to turnkey EPC and lifecycle facility management, we deliver world-class hospitals across the globe.

about.metaTitle: About Infra.Health | Healthcare Asset Development Company

about.ogTitle: About Infra.Health | Structuring the Future of Healthcare Infrastructure
about.ogDescription: Discover how Infra.Health transforms clinical demand into investment-grade assets. With 70+ projects and 13,500+ beds delivered globally, we don't just build hospitals—we structure long-term healthcare assets.
